title: More FPS (Torch)
body:
## Torch Modpack

Looking for a way to optimize your Minecraft gameplay without sacrificing performance or storage space? Look no further than the Torch modpack! I created this modpack because I know a few people who run the game on older hardware with less storage space, and I wanted to give them a way to enjoy Minecraft without having to upgrade their computers. 

## What can you expect from Torch?

- A very minimal amount of expectations
- The most minimal amount of mods for a decent performance boost
- A zoom feature to make your game more classy

## Notes On Versions

The Layout of each version released will go in this order, "Torch-Version-Patch/Release" Here is an example:

Torch-1.19.4-R

Torch stands for Torch
Version is the version of the game that it has been released for, e.g. 1.19.4
Patch/Release will be either an "R", which stands for "Release" or a "P" which stands for "Patch"

-There will also be a "V" on the end of some "R"s or "P"s the "V" stands for Voice chat, which will take up more storage, but I got a request for it. It uses Plasmo Voice.

Download Torch today and start playing with fire!
